overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long PBR Daily ETF (PBRG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Petroleo Brasileiro S.A. (NYSE: PBR) stock, less fees, and expenses PBRG was launched on Dec 18, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
